summary: Tested 2 P0 fixes: (1) Backend service filtering - /api/service-box/services now defaults active_only=True correctly excluding inactive services from consumer views. (2) Frontend debounce+multi-field search in ServiceBox, BundleBox, and SoulProductsManager - all 3 confirmed working with 350ms debounce. All 8 backend tests passed. All 3 frontend debounce tests passed.
critical_code_review_comments: ServiceBox admin component (line 143) calls /api/admin/services?pillar=X (not /api/service-box/services). The P0 fix is specifically for /api/service-box/services used by consumer pages - this separation is correct and expected.

The PILLARS hardcoded counts in ServiceBox.jsx (e.g. adopt: 31) don't match actual active service counts (21 active out of 31 total) - this is a cosmetic discrepancy in admin UI but doesn't affect functionality.

SoulProductsManager shows '0 services' for 'cake' search - this is because the products are loaded from /api/products?limit=500 (general products, not bakery/cake type). Debounce is confirmed working.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (3/3 debounce tests passed, consumer page verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 fixes verified: (1) /api/service-box/services endpoint defaults active_only=True - verified adopt pillar returns 21 active (not 31 total, 10 were inactive). (2) ServiceBox, BundleBox, SoulProductsManager all have working 350ms debounce search confirmed by 150ms pre-debounce count unchanged / 550ms post-debounce count changed pattern. Consumer services page loads 327 bookable services (all active). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_service_box_filtering.py.

backend_service_filtering.adopt_pillar_default: 21 active services returned, 0 inactive (previously 31 returned including 10 inactive)
backend_service_filtering.adopt_pillar_active_only_false: 31 services returned (21 active + 10 inactive) - admin bypass works

frontend_debounce.ServiceBox: 31→31 at 150ms (no change), filtered after 350ms debounce - CONFIRMED
frontend_debounce.BundleBox: 96→96 at 150ms (no change), 2 after 350ms debounce for 'cake' - CONFIRMED

detailed_findings.consumer_page: Consumer services page (/services) shows 327 bookable active services for logged-in user Dipali/Mojo
